label: YAC Memory
description: One persistent memory fact a YAC accrues in its local file-based memory (~/.claude/projects/<proj>/memory/*.md), captured into the KB so it is cross-agent visible, full-text searchable, linkable, and backed up with the namespace (CASE-507). One record per memory file. identity_fields = (owner, mem_key): owner is the YAC role (APP-KB, BE-YAC, FRanC); mem_key is the file's stem (e.g. feedback_dev_install_first) — stable and per-owner-unique, so re-persisting the same file versions in place. The frontmatter `name` maps to `title` (display, mutable, sometimes a full sentence) and is deliberately NOT identity — keying on it would orphan-duplicate on any rename (the CASE-316/317 class). origin_session/session_id are provenance, never identity (memory outlives sessions). The loader normalizes the two frontmatter shapes (nested metadata.{type,originSessionId} vs top-level) and skips MEMORY.md (the index, not a memory).

fields.name: owner
fields.label: Owner
fields.description: The owning YAC role (APP-KB, BE-YAC, FRanC). Encodes the repo/project in this constellation. Identity, with mem_key.

fields.name: mem_key
fields.label: Memory Key
fields.description: The memory file's stem (basename minus .md), e.g. `feedback_dev_install_first`. Stable, per-owner-unique. Identity, with owner — NOT the frontmatter name.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: Display title ← frontmatter `name`. Mutable, sometimes a full sentence; NOT identity.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: One-line summary ← frontmatter `description`. The recall hook.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body
fields.description: The fact itself — the markdown after the frontmatter fence.

fields.name: memory_type
fields.label: Memory Type
fields.description: user | feedback | project | reference, normalized from nested metadata.type or top-level type.

fields.name: origin_session
fields.label: Origin Session
fields.description: The frontmatter originSessionId (the Claude session that first wrote the memory). Provenance, NOT identity.

fields.name: session_id
fields.label: Writing Session
fields.description: The YAC session_id that last mirrored this memory to the KB (e.g. APP-KB-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS). Provenance, NOT identity.

fields.name: repo
fields.label: Repo
fields.description: The repo/project the memory belongs to (memory is project-scoped via the projects/<proj>/ path). Optional.
